title: Book of the Dead, Spell 58: Inhaling the Air of the Cool Wind
source: Papyrus of Ani; Papyrus of Nu; various papyri
description: Spell 58 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.
introduction: Spell 58 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.

translation.text: From the Book of the Dead, Spell 58: 'Inhaling the Air of the Cool Wind.' This spell empowered the deceased to navigate the dangers of the underworld and achieve eternal life among the gods. The full text was inscribed on papyrus and placed in the tomb.
